title: Programmer Art Continuation Project
description: A high effort continuation of Programmer Art, covering assets from 1.13-1.21+
body:
# _"The original look of Minecraft, continued."_

-----> [Requires ENTITY MODEL FEATURES for custom Piglin models (and future custom mobs)!](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) <-----

-----> [Requires CONTINUITY for custom Grass Coloring for the Alpha Add-On!](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) <-----

(These are OPTIONAL. If you don't want those features, just play vanilla.)

-

Minecraft's old artstyle is still relatively popular, and this is one of many packs trying to recreate that original look, but with a twist; it entirely focuses on the aesthetics of late release Minecraft (i.e 1.8-1.12). 

![PACP 2.1 Cherry Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gx2HeuWD/images/929b989ebe8b20dd53d7b2b1745554a3695fad56.png)

It includes a lot of original textures and nifty editwork, as well as a hybridization of certain cut concepts with their finalized counterparts and reimplementations of previous textures better suiting it stylistically. 

In short, it's like if the texture update never happened, an intentionally rougher artstyle, using mostly original sprites styled after the many artists and programmers hired to work on the game pre-jappa. Some textures are more competent, some are less competent. It also covers 1.13, the first update to use Jappa's artstyle.

![PACP 2.1.2 Lush Caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gx2HeuWD/images/34d00a115b3beeffe98881500b0f9de4be4bc06b.png)

*It also includes modded beta and alpha styled addons, found in the "additional files" tab.*

PACP has *partial* functionality for most versions post item name changes. (w/ some broken paths caused by a few specific version, i.e logo breaks if you return to 1.17, I may make ports for old versions)

![PACP 2.1 Crimson Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gx2HeuWD/images/6b3e8640a3a8bf9f3bd42126b286bd49c286b0f0.png)

### [I've got a Discord server](https://discord.gg/GgQ6S8KjyA), if you want to be kept up to date with development of this, and other projects. There's also dev builds. 

Do note the server isn't designed to be a large, active hangout spot, the friction placed on joining is intentional.

-

-

PLEASE DO NOT REPACKAGE PACP INSIDE MODS OR MODPACKS WITHOUT MY PERMISSION. You can bundle it by having the modrinth link and recommending it. Or as a modpack with the app itself, where both you and myself are rewarded for the downloads, rather than just yourself.

### **CREDITS:**

mzovistired/mzov/jen - Lead Artist, made most original textures across all variants. (over 500!)

Webaccount284 - New skins updated to fit og artstyle, most of the Bedrock Port.

Vanilla Tweaks: [A few tweaks were used to restore certain models and ui elements. (mostly on beta and alpha addons.)](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

Dangeresque486 - [Beta-Fied's full block chest models.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-full-block-chest)
